reviews.text: Authentic and delicious! Added a splash of lime juice and a pinch of sea salt. Also added a dash of hot sauce and topped with fresh cilantro.
Used ham hocks instead of pork shoulder. Added extra bay leaves and a pinch of black pepper. Served with farofa.
Perfect recipe! Followed it exactly and turned out great. Will make again.
Really good recipe. My family loved it. Simple to follow.
It was okay. Nothing special but edible. Might make again with changes.
Didn't work for me. Flavor was off and texture was wrong.
